headline: Sarawak Pepper Industry Revenue Collapses From RM3 Billion
context: Sarawak pepper revenue fell from RM3 billion in 2016 to RM680 million in 2025 as global prices crashed and Vietnam competition grew.

cards.big: Sarawak pepper revenue fell from RM3 billion in 2016 to RM680 million
cards.sub: World former largest pepper producer now ranks 5th behind Vietnam and India

cards.big: Active pepper farms dropped from 68,000 to 28,000 in Sarawak over 9 years
cards.sub: Remaining farmers average only RM1,400 monthly income from pepper cultivation

cards.big: Vietnamese production at 300,000 tonnes undercuts Sarawak 22,000 tonnes
cards.sub: Price per kg fell from RM65 in 2016 to RM18 in 2025 making farming unprofitable

cards.big: State allocated RM45 million for pepper industry revitalization in 2026
cards.sub: Programme promotes premium organic certification for higher niche market prices

cards.big: Pepper collapse tests whether traditional commodities can survive global competition
Pepper revenue collapsing from RM3 billion shows Sarawak's commodity dependence remains a systemic risk.
